title: PR Gate Summary v1
description: Output of release-readiness-combine: deterministic merge of pr-risk.json and release-readiness.json into a single PR-gate verdict. Applies BLOCK > WARN > PASS precedence.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped only on breaking changes.

pr_risk.description: Snapshot of the pr-risk.json input. UNKNOWN status indicates the input could not be parsed.

release_readiness.description: Snapshot of the release-readiness.json input plus optional report.json enrichment.

final_gate.description: Deterministic combined verdict. workflow_should_fail mirrors status==BLOCK and is the canonical signal for the enforcement step in CI.

required_actions.description: Deduplicated, ordered list of human-readable actions before merge. Order: standard items, then PR-risk required validations, then RR blockers, then RR warnings, then RR recommended actions.

report_enriched.description: True when release-readiness/report.json was loaded successfully and contributed blocker/warning/recommendation strings.
